title: An Order for the Strict Implementation Pursuant to the Local Inter-Agency Task Force for COVID-19 Resolution No. 2021-015 entitled "Resolution Allowing Riders of the Food Delivery Services to Deliver Food Beyond 8:00 PM (Eight O 'Clock in the Evening ) until 10:00 PM (Ten O 'Clock in the Evening Only) with Proof of Identification and or Certification of the Barangay Issued to them in the Municipality of Los Baños.
